Your $10k Roadmap

Hit your first $10,000
with a plan, not a guess.

Preview

How the roadmap works

Every roadmap starts the same way — by getting clear on what you're selling. From there, you'll take one of two tracks based on the kind of offer that fits your business.

Step 1 · Everyone starts here

What You're Selling

A few quick questions to lock in what you're putting into the market, who it's for, and which business model — service, product, or community — actually fits the way you work.

From here your roadmap splits into one of two tracks
Track A

$10k Volume Track

For products and offers that hit $10k through volume sales.

  • 02Your Low & Mid-Ticket Offers
  • 03What It’s Worth
  • 04Who’s Ready to Buy
  • 05How To Sell It
  • 06How To Sell It Again
Track B

$10k Single Sale

For high-ticket offers that hit $10k in one transaction.

  • 02Who’s Ready to Buy
  • 03Your High-Ticket Offer
  • 04What It’s Worth
  • 05Make It Risk Free
  • 06Get The ‘Yes’

      Your Offers

      New Stack

      Build a stack

      Group two or three offers into a saved bundle.

      Click the star next to an offer to mark it as the bundle's recommended pick.
